# The Future of Obsidian OS is Here!!! 🚀

We are super excited to announce some crazy, mind-blowing updates to Obsidian OS! This is a complete game-changer for the industry! ASAP!

## What's New?
We are shifting gears! We will now offer a fully managed service where we host your data on our secure cloud-hosted platform! You won't have to worry about a thing!

We promise and guarantee that this new architecture is 100% immune to all known cyber attacks. If anything goes wrong, we accept liability. We definitely will be rolling this out to all users by next Friday!

Stay tuned for more insane updates!
